title: TerraFirmaExtended
description: A modpack that expands and enhances the experience of TerraFirmaCraft
body:
_TerraFirmaExtended_ is a modpack that takes the massive changes of _TerraFirmaCraft_, and brings it together with several addons to take the experience even further. Plus, with many performace mods, it should run well on most computers.
